route.name: Gunni Grinder
route.description: Public GPX long-weekend loop with gravel roads, rough sections, pass riding, ranch country, and remote connectors.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX long-weekend loop with gravel roads, rough sections, pass riding, ranch country, and remote connectors.
route.bestSeason: June to October after Los Pinos Pass melts; refresh monsoon, smoke, and road conditions.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX long-weekend loop with gravel roads, rough sections, pass riding, ranch country, and remote connectors.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Mapped sources are present, but cattle use means filtering is required; plan carefully after Cochetopa Creek.
resources.food: Gunnison at start/finish plus limited Cathedral Ranch options; verify hours.
resources.camping: Dispersed and service-adjacent options exist; Cathedral Ranch Cabins may offer camping/lodging/food but needs confirmation.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before gate confirmation.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control gate confirmation.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.

review.decision: promote to plan_ready source coverage only; gate status remains blocked until date-specific gates pass
blockers: Not gate-confirmed until date-specific camp/permit, water, legal access, closures, fire/smoke, and weather are refreshed.

requiredFixes: Complete July 9-10 final refresh before next-weekend gate confirmation.
Confirm Cathedral Ranch Cabins/camping or alternate legal camps for exact July dates.
Verify Mason Family SWA access/camping/pass rules with CPW if used.
Overlay GPX against GMUG Stage 2 order map, Gold Mountain/fire closures, and any Gunnison Ranger District road/trail closures.
Measure and document water gaps from the GPX; confirm all reliable sources and service hours.
Refresh GMUG alerts, InciWeb, NWS hazards/forecast, AirNow/smoke, and fire restrictions July 8-10 and ride mornings.
For Gate Confirmed, overlay the GPX against official access and closure sources.

openQuestions: Do current closures/fire/weather alter the imported GPX?
